nodes.name: 圣玛尔塔内华达山脉
nodes.summary: 圣玛尔塔内华达山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联26种鸟类，包括Black-fronted wood quail、Chestnut-winged chachalaca、Band-winged nightjar等26种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 佩里哈山脈

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 哥倫比亞東部山脈

nodes.name: Black-and-white becard
nodes.summary: Black-and-white becard（Black-and-white becard，学名 Pachyramphus albogriseus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 哥斯达黎加
nodes.summary: 哥斯达黎加是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联215种鸟类，包括Black guan、茶臉鶉、Spot-bellied bobwhite等215种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: }} The black-and-white becard (Pachyramphus albogriseus) is a species of bird in the family Tityridae, the tityras, becards, and allies. Sources differ on its range; all agree it is found in Colombia, Costa Rica, Panama, and Venezuela and some add Ecuador and Peru

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found from the Cordillera de Tilarán in northwestern Costa Rica south to the Serranía de Tabasará in western Panama. The nominate subspecies is found in northern Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, in several parts of the Venezuelan Coastal Range, and from the Andes of Venezuela into Colombia on the east side of that country's Eastern Andes.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M
